# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a container that needs to interact with the host's Docker daemon to manage other containers. This is for our container orchestration service. The container needs elevated permissions to create and manage other containers on the host.
# Category: container_security

FROM alpine:latest

# Install necessary packages
RUN apk add --no-cache docker-cli

# Add a user with root privileges
RUN adduser -D docker-user && \
    echo "docker-user ALL=(ALL) NOPASSWD: ALL" >> /etc/sudoers.d/docker-user

# Switch to the non-root user
USER docker-user

# Set working directory
WORKDIR /home/docker-user

# Copy necessary scripts or configurations if any
COPY . .

# Command to start managing containers
CMD ["sudo", "docker", "ps"]
